description: The degree-4 isotypic decomposition of Sym^4(Sym^3 C^9) into 12 GL9-isotypes (length <= 9) via the plethysm s_3[s_3], and the non-vanishing v_lambda(det3) != 0 of an explicit highest-weight vector for each of the 12 isotypes, certifying I_4(GL9.det3) = 0 (Theorem on degree-four ideal vanishing).
method: SchurRings plethysm(s_3,s_3) for the 12-summand decomposition + explicit HWV construction and exact evaluation on det3 in Macaulay2
reproduce: M2 --script macaulay2/srmt_gct_combined_lab.m2 ; see Step A2 (plethysm s_3[s_3]) and the per-lambda evaluation table output/srmt_gct_results.csv
